description: After a blast, an engineer uses a photo-analysis system to check the rock fragmentation to ensure it is suitable for the shovel and crusher.

nodes.task_description: Take several photos of the muckpile (the pile of blasted rock) from different angles.

expected_outcome.expected: High-resolution images of the muckpile are captured.

nodes.task_description: Upload the images to a fragmentation analysis software.

expected_outcome.expected: The images are successfully uploaded for processing.

nodes.task_description: The software analyzes the images and generates a particle size distribution curve, showing the percentage of fine and coarse rock.

expected_outcome.expected: A report is generated showing the P80 (80% passing) size is 30cm, which meets the target for efficient digging.
